anchor.value: {\displaystyle {\begin{aligned}|\Gamma (bi)|^{2}&={\frac {\pi }{b\sinh \pi b}}\\[6pt]\left|\Gamma \left({\tfrac {1}{2}}+bi\right)\right|^{2}&={\frac {\pi }{\cosh \pi b}}\\[6pt]\left|\Gamma \left(1+bi\right)\right|^{2}&={\frac {\pi b}{\sinh \pi b}}\\[6pt]\left|\Gamma \left(1+n+bi\right)\right|^{2}&={\frac {\pi b}{\sinh \pi b}}\prod _{k=1}^{n}\left(k^{2}+b^{2}\right),\quad n\in \mathbb {N} \\[6pt]\left|\Gamma \left(-n+bi\right)\right|^{2}&={\frac {\pi }{b\sinh \pi b}}\prod _{k=1}^{n}\left(k^{2}+b^{2}\right)^{-1},\quad n\in \mathbb {N} \\[6pt]\left|\Gamma \left({\tfrac {1}{2}}\pm n+bi\right)\right|^{2}&={\frac {\pi }{\cosh \pi b}}\prod _{k=1}^{n}\left(\left(k-{\tfrac {1}{2}}\right)^{2}+b^{2}\right)^{\pm 1},\quad n\in \mathbb {N} \\[-1ex]&\end{aligned}}}

anchor.value: {\displaystyle {\begin{aligned}\operatorname {log\Gamma } \left({\frac {k}{n}}\right)={}&{\frac {\,(n-2k)\log 2\pi \,}{2n}}+{\frac {1}{2}}\left\{\,\log \pi -\log \sin {\frac {\pi k}{n}}\,\right\}+{\frac {1}{\pi }}\!\sum _{r=1}^{n-1}{\frac {\,\gamma +\log r\,}{r}}\cdot \sin {\frac {\,2\pi rk\,}{n}}\\&{}-{\frac {1}{2\pi }}\sin {\frac {2\pi k}{n}}\cdot \!\int _{0}^{\infty }\!\!{\frac {\,e^{-nx}\!\cdot \log x\,}{\,\cosh x-\cos(2\pi k/n)\,}}\,{\mathrm {d} }x.\end{aligned}}}
